prompt: Which formula is the CONTRAPOSITIVE of P → Q (and therefore equivalent to it)?
hint: The contrapositive swaps AND negates both parts.
explanation: The contrapositive of P → Q is ¬Q → ¬P, which has the same truth table. 'Q → P' is the converse and '¬P → ¬Q' is the inverse — both are NOT equivalent to the original (a common confusion).
